from source import filter_expensive_items

def test_filter_expensive_items_coerces_string_prices():
    items = [
        {"name": "Item1", "price": 100},
        {"name": "Item2", "price": "200"},
        {"name": "Item3", "price": "150"},
    ]
    threshold = 150
    result = filter_expensive_items(items, threshold)
    expected = [{"name": "Item2", "price": "200"}]
    assert result == expected, f"Expected items with price > {threshold} after coercion to be {expected}, got {result}"
